---
title: "Placeholder 01"
---

This is a placeholder for part of the website

## Setup

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| echo: false

library(fredr)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggiraph)

fredr_set_key(Sys.getenv("FRED_API_KEY"))

GEO_COLS <- c(
  "United States"        = "#1f77b4",
  "California"           = "#ff7f0e",
  "Ventura County"       = "#2ca02c",
  "Ventura County (MSA)" = "#2ca02c"
)

fmt_pct    <- function(x) paste0(round(x, 1), "%")
fmt_dollar <- function(x) paste0("$", formatC(round(x), format = "d", big.mark = ","))
fmt_M      <- function(x) paste0(round(x, 2), "M")
fmt_idx    <- function(x) as.character(round(x, 1))

g_opts <- list(
  opts_hover(css = "stroke-width:2.5;opacity:1;"),
  opts_hover_inv(css = "opacity:0.15;"),
  opts_tooltip(
    css = paste0(
      "background:white;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:6px;",
      "padding:6px 10px;font-size:12px;font-family:sans-serif;",
      "box-shadow:0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,.12);"
    ),
    use_fill = FALSE
  )
)

make_chart <- function(df, y_col="value", group_col="geo", col_map,
                       y_label="", y_fmt_fn=fmt_idx, y_gg_fmt=waiver(), subtitle=NULL) {
  df <- df %>% rename(y = all_of(y_col), group = all_of(group_col))
  df <- df %>% mutate(tip = paste0("<b>", group, "</b><br>",
                                   format(date, "%b %Y"), "<br>", y_fmt_fn(y)))
  ggplot(df, aes(x = date, y = y, color = group, group = group)) +
    geom_line_interactive(aes(tooltip = group, data_id = group), linewidth = 0.9) +
    scale_color_manual(values = col_map) +
    scale_x_date(date_breaks = "4 years", date_labels = "%Y") +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = y_gg_fmt) +
    labs(x = NULL, y = y_label, subtitle = subtitle, color = NULL) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
    theme(
      legend.position  = "top",
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "#eeeeee"),
      axis.text        = element_text(color = "#555555"),
      plot.subtitle    = element_text(size = 10, color = "#777777")
    )
}

wrap <- function(p) girafe(ggobj = p, width_svg = 9, height_svg = 4, options = g_opts)
```

## Unemployment Rate

```{r}
#| label: unemployment
#| echo: false

us_u <- fredr("UNRATE")                %>% mutate(geo = "United States")
ca_u <- fredr("CAUR")                  %>% mutate(geo = "California")
vc_u <- fredr("LAUCN061110000000003A") %>% mutate(geo = "Ventura County")

unemp <- bind_rows(us_u, ca_u, vc_u) %>%
  select(date, value, geo) %>%
  filter(date >= as.Date("2000-01-01"))

wrap(make_chart(unemp, y_col="value", group_col="geo", col_map=GEO_COLS,
  y_label="Unemployment Rate (%)", y_fmt_fn=fmt_pct,
  y_gg_fmt=function(x) paste0(x, "%"),
  subtitle="Hover a line to highlight it and see exact values"))
```

## JOLTS — Job Openings, Hires, Quits & Layoffs

```{r}
#| label: jolts
#| echo: false

jolts_series <- c(
  "JTSJOL" = "Job Openings",
  "JTSHIL" = "Hires",
  "JTSQUL" = "Quits",
  "JTSLDL" = "Layoffs & Discharges"
)

jolts_data <- map_dfr(names(jolts_series), function(id) {
  fredr(id) %>% mutate(series = jolts_series[[id]], value = value / 1000)
}) %>%
  select(date, value, series) %>%
  filter(date >= as.Date("2005-01-01"))

JOLTS_COLS <- c(
  "Job Openings"         = "#1f77b4",
  "Hires"                = "#2ca02c",
  "Quits"                = "#ff7f0e",
  "Layoffs & Discharges" = "#888888"
)

wrap(make_chart(jolts_data, y_col="value", group_col="series", col_map=JOLTS_COLS,
  y_label="Count (millions)", y_fmt_fn=fmt_M,
  y_gg_fmt=function(x) paste0(round(x, 1), "M"),
  subtitle="United States only — state & county level data not available for JOLTS"))
```

## Unemployment Rate: US vs CA vs Ventura County

```{r}
#| label: vc-chart
#| echo: false

recent_unemp <- unemp %>% filter(date >= as.Date("2010-01-01"))

wrap(make_chart(recent_unemp, y_col="value", group_col="geo", col_map=GEO_COLS,
  y_label="Unemployment Rate (%)", y_fmt_fn=fmt_pct,
  y_gg_fmt=function(x) paste0(x, "%"),
  subtitle="2010-present | Hover a line to highlight it"))
```

## Latest Snapshot

```{r}
#| label: latest-table
#| echo: false

latest <- recent_unemp %>%
  group_by(geo) %>%
  slice_max(date, n = 1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  arrange(value) %>%
  rename(
    Geography        = geo,
    `Latest Date`    = date,
    `Unemployment %` = value
  )

knitr::kable(latest, digits = 1)
```

## GDP Growth (Indexed Comparison)

```{r}
#| label: gdp-comparison
#| echo: false

vc_gdp <- fredr("GDPALL06111") %>% mutate(geo = "Ventura County")
ca_gdp <- fredr("CANGSP")      %>% mutate(geo = "California")
us_gdp <- fredr("GDPA")        %>% mutate(geo = "United States", value = value * 1000)

gdp_all <- bind_rows(vc_gdp, ca_gdp, us_gdp) %>%
  select(date, value, geo) %>%
  filter(date >= as.Date("2001-01-01")) %>%
  group_by(geo) %>%
  mutate(indexed = value / first(value) * 100) %>%
  ungroup()

wrap(make_chart(gdp_all, y_col="indexed", group_col="geo", col_map=GEO_COLS,
  y_label="Index (2001 = 100)", y_fmt_fn=fmt_idx,
  subtitle="Allows fair comparison across different-sized economies | Annual"))
```

## Per Capita Personal Income

```{r}
#| label: income-comparison
#| echo: false

vc_inc <- fredr("PCPI06111")       %>% mutate(geo = "Ventura County")
ca_inc <- fredr("CAPCPI")          %>% mutate(geo = "California")
us_inc <- fredr("A792RC0A052NBEA") %>% mutate(geo = "United States")

income_all <- bind_rows(vc_inc, ca_inc, us_inc) %>%
  select(date, value, geo) %>%
  filter(date >= as.Date("2000-01-01"))

wrap(make_chart(income_all, y_col="value", group_col="geo", col_map=GEO_COLS,
  y_label="Dollars per person", y_fmt_fn=fmt_dollar,
  y_gg_fmt=function(x) paste0("$", round(x / 1000), "k"),
  subtitle="US vs California vs Ventura County | Annual"))
```

## Population Growth (Indexed Comparison)

```{r}
#| label: population-comparison
#| echo: false

vc_pop <- fredr("CAVENT2POP") %>% mutate(geo = "Ventura County", value = value * 1000)
ca_pop <- fredr("CAPOP")      %>% mutate(geo = "California",     value = value * 1000)
us_pop <- fredr("POPTHM")     %>% mutate(geo = "United States",  value = value * 1000)

pop_all <- bind_rows(vc_pop, ca_pop, us_pop) %>%
  select(date, value, geo) %>%
  filter(date >= as.Date("2000-01-01")) %>%
  group_by(geo) %>%
  mutate(indexed = value / first(value) * 100) %>%
  ungroup()

wrap(make_chart(pop_all, y_col="indexed", group_col="geo", col_map=GEO_COLS,
  y_label="Index (2000 = 100)", y_fmt_fn=fmt_idx,
  subtitle="Is Ventura County growing faster or slower than the state and nation?"))
```

## Nonfarm Payroll Employment

```{r}
#| label: payroll-all
#| echo: false

us_pay <- fredr("PAYEMS")    %>% mutate(geo = "United States")
ca_pay <- fredr("CANA")      %>% mutate(geo = "California")
vc_pay <- fredr("OXNA106NA") %>% mutate(geo = "Ventura County (MSA)")

payroll_all <- bind_rows(us_pay, ca_pay, vc_pay) %>%
  select(date, value, geo) %>%
  filter(date >= as.Date("2000-01-01")) %>%
  group_by(geo) %>%
  mutate(indexed = value / first(value) * 100) %>%
  ungroup()

wrap(make_chart(payroll_all, y_col="indexed", group_col="geo", col_map=GEO_COLS,
  y_label="Index (2000 = 100)", y_fmt_fn=fmt_idx,
  subtitle="Ventura County MSA (Oxnard-Thousand Oaks-Ventura) vs CA vs US | Monthly"))
```
